_comment: Manually reviewed claims the fabricated-claims audit may not find verbatim in research dumps. Each entry must include who verified it and why it's true. Match key: slug + field + matched_text.

allowed.reason: Hincapie Gran Fondo is a real multi-event series (Greenville, Chattanooga, Lehigh Valley, Fort Worth, Bentonville).
Rudi Altig won the 1966 UCI Road World Championship at the Nürburgring — documented cycling history, not a claim about this event.
